nasb.text: Thus the ark of the Lord remained in the house of Obed-edom the Gittite three months, and the Lord blessed Obed-edom and all his household.

esv.text: And the ark of the Lord remained in the house of Obed-edom the Gittite three months, and the Lord blessed Obed-edom and all his household.

cnv.text: 耶和華的約櫃在迦特人俄別．以東的家停留了三個月，耶和華賜福給俄別．以東和他的全家。

ccb.text: 耶和华的约柜在俄别·以东家停放了三个月，耶和华赐福给俄别·以东和他全家。
